scripts.build:active: npm run build:2026-cannon-fire && npm run build:2026-flags
scripts.build:2026-cannon-fire: cd games/2026/cannon-fire && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:2026-flags: cd games/2026/flags && npm install && npm run build
scripts.freeze:2026-cannon-fire: cd games/2026/cannon-fire && npm install && npm run build && echo 'Now commit dist/2026/cannon-fire/ and remove this game from build:active'
scripts.freeze:2026-flags: cd games/2026/flags && npm install && npm run build && echo 'Now commit dist/2026/flags/ and remove this game from build:active'
